tool_input.command:
for d in devbox-setup warp-and-weft llm-orchestrator agentic-rag-mcp provider go-versioning-helper proto-store codenavd obsidian-tasks-system everything-claude-code; do
  echo "=== $d ==="
  ls <HOME>/Projects/$d/ 2>/dev/null | head -15
done
tool_input.description: Sample top-level layouts of key projects
